Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned across all process variants containing this activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average cycle time of Accepted + Assigned when followed by Completed + In Call versus when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time elapsed from Accepted + Assigned to the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in variants containing repeated Accepted + In Progress segments
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Assigned in variants that include a waiting state (e.g., Accepted + Wait - User, Accepted + Wait - Vendor, or Accepted + Wait - Implementation) after assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - User occurs

Name: Total time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Accepted + Assigned grouped by country
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Average time it takes Accepted + Assigned to be executed after Queued + Awaiting Assignment in high-impact cases (impact = 'High')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + Closed in variants that pass through Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum cycle time of Accepted + Assigned in variants that do not contain any waiting states
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Accepted + Assigned and the subsequent Accepted + In Progress in multi-loop variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total resolution time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + Closed when Completed + In Call is an intermediate step
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Time elapsed from case start to Accepted + Assigned in variants that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Assigned in cases handled by resources from Brazil versus USA versus France
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case grouped by the last value of resource country

Name: Time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + In Call compared to time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + Resolved in shared variant structures
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'
